name: 15-Minute Massage
description: Winner chooses the region (non-sexual); loser provides the massage.

name: At-Home Micro-Date
description: Winner dictates the vibe and cuisine; loser handles 100% of the setup, execution, and cleanup.

name: 3 Truths
description: Winner picks three questions from an intimacy deck for both to answer honestly.

name: Spa Treatment
description: Loser draws a bath, warms a towel in the dryer, and finishes by applying lotion for the winner.

name: Flirty/Semi-Lewd Selfies
description: Winner requests a specific vibe of selfie from the loser, to be delivered by Friday.

name: "May I Have This Dance?"
description: Loser sets up dim lighting and plays a favorite song for a distraction-free kitchen slow dance.

name: Secret Admirer Note
description: Loser writes a flirty or appreciative note and hides it for the winner to find before Friday night.

name: The Personal Dresser
description: Loser picks out the winner's loungewear or sleepwear for Friday night and physically helps them change into it.
